CustomField.description: If unchecked, the framework enqueues each handler invocation in a single job and the processor runs in a queueable context. If checked, the framework invokes the process during the Log Trigger and it is up to the processor to control queueing. Note: Checking this means that the processor is running within a DML context and has uncommitted work pending and so cannot make a callout without first handling the queueing.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If unchecked, the framework enqueues each handler invocation in a single job and the processor runs in a queueable context. If checked, the framework invokes the process during the Log Trigger and it is up to the processor to control queueing. Note: Checking this means that the processor is running within a DML context and has uncommitted work pending and so cannot make a callout without first handling the queueing.
CustomField.label: ControlQueueing
